items.title: Hornets, Kings discussed Domantas Sabonis trade that would have sent Miles Bridges, Josh Green, draft capital to Sacramento
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt: Hornets, Kings discussed Domantas Sabonis trade that would have sent Miles Bridges, Josh Green, draft capital to Sacramento HoopsHype

items.title: [Scotto] One framework loosely kicked around included Charlotte’s Miles Bridges, Josh Green, and a potential first-round draft pick going to Sacramento in exchange for Sabonis.
items.author: YujiDomainExpansion
items.body_excerpt: Source: https://www.hoopshype.com/story/sports/nba/2026/06/10/nba-intel-domantas-sabonis-michael-porter-jr-pelicans-trade-talks-raptors-cavs/90491200007/ The Sacramento Kings and Charlotte Hornets had exploratory trade talks surrounding Domantas Sabonis , league sources told…
